headline: Akamai Benefits From Robust Security Demand: More Upside Ahead?
summary: AKAM's security business is gaining from rising demand for web application firewall, API security solutions, helping position the segment for continued growth.

headline: Akamai Research: Commerce Becomes the Epicenter for AI Bot Attacks and Agentic Fraud in 2026
summary: Commerce faces rising AI bot activity, escalating DDoS attacks, and new fraud tacticsCAMBRIDGE, Mass., July 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- An evolution toward agentic commerce and autonomous AI tools has made commerce the world’s most targeted industry by cybercriminals, according to the latest Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM) State of the Internet (SOTI) security report, Securing the Agentic Storefront: Attacks on Commerce. The report highlights that, as of December 2025, nearly half (47.9%) of all commerce
